setlist.info: With their residency taking 3.5 weeks off so Las Vegas can be taken over by the upcoming F1 race, Bono introduces the band as: Max Verstappen (Bram), Lewis Hamilton (Adam), Charles Leclerc (The Edge), and Daniel Ricciardo (“on vocals”). Soundcheck without Bono included "I Will Follow" (The Edge on vocals), the rest with recorded vocals: "Beautiful Day", "Zoo Station", and "All I Want Is You".

setlist.info: Before "Pride (In the Name of Love)" Bono said "In the light of what’s happened in Israel and Gaza, a song about non-violence seems somewhat ridiculous, even laughable, but our prayers have always been for peace and for non-violence so. But our hearts and our anger, you know where that’s pointed. So sing with us, and those beautiful kids at that music festival.", referencing the casualties at Israel's Nova Festival
